details.test: Task 1: Add 2 balcony tickets for cheapest concert within price range
Task 2: Submit adult chorus Alto application with Tuesday evening availability
Task 3: Sign up as usher for earliest March event with usher role
Task 4: Add three contemporary pieces from 2000+ to practice list
Task 5: Start youth program registration for 10-year-old with weekend rehearsals
Task 6: Subscribe to monthly newsletter for concert updates and volunteer opportunities
Task 7: Make one-time 35-dollar donation to Scholarship Fund
Task 8: Add 3 GA tickets for Sunday afternoon family concert
Task 9: Send accessibility inquiry for next downtown concert
